title: Inazuma Eleven GO vs. Danball Senki W
original_title: 劇場版 イナズマイレブンGO vs ダンボール戦機W
overview: As Shinsei Inazuma Japan was about to have a match with Inazuma Legend Japan, a mysterious attack of a person and a swarm of robots interrupted, and another mysterious girl's power drove the world into another dimension. As the world of Inazuma Eleven Go and Danball Senki W met, the two teams must work together to find out what happened to their worlds.
